icy: adjective. Pertaining to, resembling, or abounding in ice; cold; frosty.

cro: noun. Synonym of bro (“a male comrade or friend”).

fibro: noun. Fibro-cement; a building material consisting of asbestos fibres and cement pressed into sheets.
flob: noun. Spittle or phlegm, especially a piece of spittle or phlegm that has been spat out.
flory: adjective. Decorated with fleurs-de-lis projecting from it.
folic: adjective. Of or relating to foliage; pteroylglutamic, as in folic acid.
